scripts.deploy: tsc && node dist/manifest-gen.js && mkdir -p ../TheArchiver/plugins/plugin-youtube && cp dist/index.js dist/sites.js dist/settings.js manifest.json ../TheArchiver/plugins/plugin-youtube/ && cp -r yt-dlp-plugins ../TheArchiver/plugins/plugin-youtube/
scripts.package: tsc && node dist/manifest-gen.js && mkdir -p dist/package && cp dist/index.js dist/sites.js dist/settings.js manifest.json dist/package/ && cp -r yt-dlp-plugins dist/package/ && cd dist/package && zip -r ../plugin-youtube.zip .
